parameters.query: SELECT workflow_id, last_run_at, rows_synced FROM sync_state WHERE workflow_id = 'wf13';

INSERT INTO public.osha_violations (
  inspection_id, establishment_name, inspection_date,
  naics, naics_description, city, state, zip,
  penalty_initial, penalty_current,
  citations_serious, citations_willful, citations_repeat, citations_other,
  raw_payload
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.inspection_id }}',
  '{{ $json.establishment_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.inspection_date ? "'" + $json.inspection_date + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.naics ? "'" + $json.naics + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  NULL,
  {{ $json.city  ? "'" + $json.city.replace(/'/g, "''")  + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.state ? "'" + $json.state + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.zip   ? "'" + $json.zip   + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.penalty_initial ?? 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.penalty_current ?? 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.citations_serious ?? 0 }},
  {{ $json.citations_willful ?? 0 }},
  {{ $json.citations_repeat  ?? 0 }},
  {{ $json.citations_other   ?? 0 }},
  '{{ $json.raw_payload.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (inspection_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

UPDATE public.sync_state
SET last_run_at = NOW(), rows_synced = {{ $json.rows_synced }}, last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE workflow_id = 'wf13'
RETURNING workflow_id, last_run_at, rows_synced;
